chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 1125 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection / reply 2. For orders on CMA No.2766/2023 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.2765/2023 11.11.2025 Mr. Zohaib Hassan, advocate for the applicant This reference application is pending since 2023 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. Even today learned counsel for the applicant is present and seeks time. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
